title: All But 1
description: A mod lets you take a stack out of a container, but leave 1.
body:
**AllBut1** is a Fabric mod to take nearly an entire stack from a container while leaving **one** item behind, for marking what should go a slot without emptying it completely. ## Usage 1. Open a container (like a chest). 2. **Hold down** the “AllBut1” key (default ```Left Ctr```). 3. **Click** on a full (or partial) stack of items. 4. Will pick up all but one item, leaving a single item behind as a placeholder.

## Controls - Change keybind in **Options → Controls → AllBut1**. ## Dependencies ### Required
